title: Support passing dynamic array as an argument to DPI
body:
I'm facing an issue with passing a dynamic array as an argument to a DPI in SV files, and I got this error message :

`../V3Task.cpp:1086: Passing dynamic array or queue as actual argument to DPI open array is not yet supported`

The code I'm trying to parse : 
```
import "DPI-C" function void UVMC_XL_CONV_SV2C_copy_c2sv_array(
    int unsigned num_bytes,
    longint unsigned src_c_array_chandle,
    inout byte unsigned dst_sv_array[] );

import "DPI-C" function void UVMC_XL_CONV_SV2C_copy_c2sv_int_array(
    int unsigned num_bytes,
    longint unsigned src_c_array_chandle,
    inout int unsigned dst_sv_array[] );
```

Does the Verilator support this ??
